message.content:
Validate RECO-802 branch by running tests. The branch fixes ESLint warnings in frequently-bought-together.controller.ts.

1. Run: `git checkout RECO-802-fix-eslint-fbt-controller`
2. Run tests: `npx dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --config ./test/jest-unit.config.ts -- frequently-bought-together 2>&1 | tail -50`
3. Also run e2e if exists: `npx dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --runInBand --forceExit --config ./test/jest-e2e.config.ts -- frequently-bought-together 2>&1 | tail -50`
4. If tests fail, fix assertions, rerun
5. If fixes, commit --no-verify and push --no-verify
6. Run: `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20`
7. Switch back: `git checkout main`

Commit message: "RECO-802: fix tests\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>"
Report: PASS or FAIL.

content.text:
## Report: PASS

**RECO-802 Branch Validation Complete**

The RECO-802 branch (RECO-802-fix-eslint-fbt-controller) has been successfully validated:

- **E2E Tests**: 57 tests passed, 2 test suites passed in 6.656 seconds
  - frequently-bought-together.controller.ts: 100% code coverage
  - frequently-bought-together.service.ts: 100% line coverage, 96.87% branch coverage
- **TypeScript Type Check**: No errors in frequently-bought-together module
- **ESLint Fixes**: Controller properly implements LogExecution decorators with paramFormatter and responseFormatter on all three endpoints

All tests pass successfully. The ESLint warnings in the frequently-bought-together controller have been fixed correctly.
